title: RAG Enterprise — Self-hosted document intelligence platform
description:
RAG Enterprise is a 100% self-hosted Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform for sovereign document intelligence, designed for organizations that cannot use cloud-based RAG services due to regulatory, privacy, or data sovereignty constraints (legal firms, healthcare providers, financial institutions, public administration).

Architecture: React frontend + FastAPI backend with LangChain RAG pipeline, Qdrant vector database for semantic search, Ollama for local LLM inference, BAAI/bge-m3 multilingual embeddings (29 languages supported), Apache Tika + Tesseract OCR for document ingestion (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, MD, ODT, RTF, HTML, XML). JWT authentication with role-based access control (User / Super User / Admin). Fully containerized via Docker Compose with single-command installation.

The Community edition (AGPL-3.0) handles 10,000+ documents comfortably with no data leaving the user's server. The Pro edition (commercial license) extends this with a hybrid SQL-Vector engine combining traditional keyword search with semantic retrieval, and a 6-stage retrieval pipeline (query expansion → retrieval → reranking → fusion → filtering → generation) optimized for structured documents in regulated domains.

Compliant by design with GDPR and the EU AI Act.
notes: Maintained by I3K Technologies, Milan, Italy. Project website: https://i3k.eu
